"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\gen_test_img.dir/objects.a

C:\Users\12457\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WinGet\Packages\BrechtSanders.WinLibs.POSIX.UCRT_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe\mingw64\bin\c++.exe  -include "D:/Aibox/compat/compat.h" -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\gen_test_img.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o gen_test_img.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libgen_test_img.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\gen_test_img.dir\linkLibs.rsp
